name: ExtraStimulantsPlus Features
description: Built-in ExtraStimulantsPlus gameplay, editor, and utility features.

preset.label: Preset
preset.description: off = disabled. gameplay = 1spp + light denoise (default). cinematic = 4spp + heavier denoise. custom = use the per-knob sliders below.

enabled.label: Path Tracing (Beta)
enabled.description: Screen-space path tracer compositor effect. Forward+ only; off by default. Visible cost varies with samples and half-res.

samples.label: Samples per pixel
samples.description: Hemisphere rays per pixel per frame. Higher = cleaner but slower; 8 is heavy.

max_steps.label: Max ray steps
max_steps.description: Screen-space raymarch step count per ray.

thickness.label: Hit thickness
thickness.description: Depth epsilon (world units) for accepting a screen-space hit.

fade.label: Indirect intensity
fade.description: Blend weight of the indirect light onto the base color (0 = none, 1 = full).

sky_color_r.label: Sky red
sky_color_r.description: Red component of the miss-ray fallback color (corners no longer go black).

sky_color_g.label: Sky green
sky_color_g.description: Green component of the miss-ray fallback color.

sky_color_b.label: Sky blue
sky_color_b.description: Blue component of the miss-ray fallback color.

sky_intensity.label: Sky intensity
sky_intensity.description: Multiplier on the miss-ray sky color. 0 = black miss; 1 = neutral; >1 punches it up.

temporal_alpha_max.label: History length
temporal_alpha_max.description: Cap on temporal accumulation. Higher = cleaner but more lag on disocclusion. 1 disables history.

atrous_iterations.label: Denoise iterations
atrous_iterations.description: À-trous denoise passes. 0 disables denoise (just temporal), 3 is the recommended sweet spot.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Run real-time spectrum analysis on the Music bus during gameplay. Drives the 'mod_music_pulse' shader global.

smoothing.label: Smoothing
smoothing.description: 0 = snappy/twitchy response, 1 = heavy temporal smoothing of band energies.

gain.label: Reactivity gain
gain.description: Multiplier applied to the bass-pulse value before it reaches shaders.

enabled.label: Record ghosts
enabled.description: Record player position/rotation each level for replay. Discards on death; saves on completion.

record_interval.label: Record every N frames
record_interval.description: Lower = denser keyframes (more disk, smoother replay). Default 3 keeps file size reasonable.

keep_n_ghosts.label: Ghosts per level
keep_n_ghosts.description: Maximum ghosts retained per level before older recordings get pruned (future use).

mirror_mode.label: Mirror Mode
mirror_mode.description: Swaps left/right player input. Pure horizontal reversal; takes effect immediately.

turbo_mode.label: Turbo Mode
turbo_mode.description: Runs the game at 1.2x time scale. Toggle anytime; resets to 1.0x on level end.
